emails.subject: Coalition for Energy Action
emails.body: Do we have any contact w/ the Coalition for Energy Action the new business group led by the California Chamber? We need to be part of that group to at least know what they're doing and what messages they're spinning. Let me know, and we can add them into our target CEO database. thx.kd

emails.subject: Re: Coalition for Energy Action
emails.body: Re: Coalition for Energy Action I can poke around---most of the associations in that group are in the negotiations I'm stuck in. I'll let you know what I hear. Best, Jeff Karen Denne 06/15/2001 09:49 AM
